channel.title: GitHub Cuda Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Cuda in GitHub

item.title: NVIDIA/cub
item.description: [ARCHIVED] Cooperative primitives for CUDA C++. See https://github.com/NVIDIA/cccl

item.title: NVlabs/instant-ngp
item.description: Instant neural graphics primitives: lightning fast NeRF and more

item.title: rapidsai/raft
item.description: RAFT contains fundamental widely-used algorithms and primitives for machine learning and information retrieval. The algorithms are CUDA-accelerated and form building blocks for more easily writing high performance applications.

item.title: HigherOrderCO/HVM
item.description: A massively parallel, optimal functional runtime in Rust

item.title: rapidsai/cuvs
item.description: cuVS - a library for vector search and clustering on the GPU

item.title: Dao-AILab/causal-conv1d
item.description: Causal depthwise conv1d in CUDA, with a PyTorch interface

item.title: leoxiaobin/deep-high-resolution-net.pytorch
item.description: The project is an official implementation of our CVPR2019 paper "Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Human Pose Estimation"

item.title: SHI-Labs/NATTEN
item.description: Neighborhood Attention Extension. Bringing attention to a neighborhood near you!
